item.title: Kurt Russell Jokes Son Boston Became a Therapist Since ‘Rest of the Family Are Actors’ (Exclusive)
item.description: The actor says his eldest son chose a different path as a therapist as he jokes that every Hollywood family needs one

item.title: Stephen Colbert Clears Up 'Internet Rumors' About What’s Next for Him After “Late Show ”Cancellation
item.description: Colbert's late-night talk show will come to an end in May, over a decade after he took over for David Letterman

item.title: Donnie Wahlberg Says He Offered Half His Paycheck to Film “Boston Blue” Solely in Boston but CBS Said No
item.description: Wahlberg revealed on 'Radio Andy' that while the show occasionally films in his hometown, it simply "couldn't afford" to film all scenes there

item.title: Brenda Song Says Macaulay Culkin Is Constantly Pitching Ideas for More Cameos in “Running Point ”(Exclusive)
item.description: Brenda Song and Kate Hudson tell PEOPLE how enthusiastic Macaulay Culkin is about getting more involved in the show, which shocks creator Mindy Kaling

item.title: George Kittle Reveals He Wants to Be a ‘Stay at Home Dad’ When His Football Career Ends: ‘Dream Come True’ (Exclusive)
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers star spoke with PEOPLE exclusively alongside his wife Claire ahead of the 2026 NFL Draft
